root.m_Talk_ENG: It was an impulsive decision I didn't expect anyone to understand... A careless call... Selfishness.
root.m_Talk_DEU: It was an impulsive decision I didn't expect anyone to understand... A careless call... Selfishness.
root.m_Talk_FRA: It was an impulsive decision I didn't expect anyone to understand... A careless call... Selfishness.

root.m_Talk_FRA: *Huff* *Huff*

root.m_Talk_ENG: ...Hraagh!!!

root.m_Talk_FRA: ...Hraagh!!!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Because, even if it was a fleeting moment... I got you. You're more precious than eternity.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Knowing that it would end in farewell... I wanted to hear your voice, feel your warmth, and see your smile.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Knowing that it would end in farewell... I wanted to hear your voice, feel your warmth, and see your smile.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Knowing that it would end in farewell... I wanted to hear your voice, feel your warmth, and see your smile.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Ngh...!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Ngh...!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Ngh...!

root.m_Talk_ENG: I'm not giving up...
root.m_Talk_DEU: I'm not giving up...
root.m_Talk_FRA: I'm not giving up...

root.m_Talk_ENG: ...that easily!
root.m_Talk_DEU: ...that easily!
root.m_Talk_FRA: ...that easily!

root.m_Talk_ENG: So... blame it all on your selfish mother.
root.m_Talk_DEU: So... blame it all on your selfish mother.
root.m_Talk_FRA: So... blame it all on your selfish mother.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I'm sorry for making you miserable.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I'm sorry for making you miserable.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I'm sorry for making you miserable.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I love you more than eternity... my beloved star.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I love you more than eternity... my beloved star.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I love you more than eternity... my beloved star.

root.m_Talk_ENG: There's no way I would hate you.
root.m_Talk_DEU: There's no way I would hate you.
root.m_Talk_FRA: There's no way I would hate you.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Because no matter what choice you made, you're still the person I love the most.

root.m_Talk_FRA: Because no matter what choice you made, you're still the person I love the most.

root.m_Talk_ENG: So...

root.m_Talk_FRA: So...

root.m_Talk_DEU: Don't be so heartbroken, Mother.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Don't be so heartbroken, Mother.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Ah.

root.m_Talk_ENG: The tomatoes I planned to eat on my birthday... I totally forgot about them.
root.m_Talk_DEU: The tomatoes I planned to eat on my birthday... I totally forgot about them.
root.m_Talk_FRA: The tomatoes I planned to eat on my birthday... I totally forgot about them.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Would they be ripe and red by now?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Would they be ripe and red by now?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Would they be ripe and red by now?

root.m_Talk_ENG: The Corruption and your wounds have reached their limits.
root.m_Talk_DEU: The Corruption and your wounds have reached their limits.
root.m_Talk_FRA: The Corruption and your wounds have reached their limits.

root.m_Talk_ENG: You've held up well so far, kid.
root.m_Talk_DEU: You've held up well so far, kid.
root.m_Talk_FRA: You've held up well so far, kid.

root.m_Talk_ENG: You are...?
root.m_Talk_DEU: You are...?
root.m_Talk_FRA: You are...?

root.m_Talk_ENG: ...the hero?
root.m_Talk_DEU: ...the hero?
root.m_Talk_FRA: ...the hero?

root.m_Talk_ENG: I'm no hero.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I'm no hero.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I'm no hero.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Just an illusion created by regrets of the past.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Just an illusion created by regrets of the past.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Just an illusion created by regrets of the past.

root.m_Talk_ENG: However...
root.m_Talk_DEU: However...
root.m_Talk_FRA: However...

root.m_Talk_DEU: I'll be enough to remove that wall blocking your fate.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I'll be enough to remove that wall blocking your fate.

root.m_Talk_ENG: But how am I supposed to teach her that, if I'm someone who has abandoned the future my master asked to protect?
root.m_Talk_DEU: But how am I supposed to teach her that, if I'm someone who has abandoned the future my master asked to protect?
root.m_Talk_FRA: But how am I supposed to teach her that, if I'm someone who has abandoned the future my master asked to protect?

root.m_Talk_ENG: That reason... is typical of you.
root.m_Talk_DEU: That reason... is typical of you.
root.m_Talk_FRA: That reason... is typical of you.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Ha ha. It's all thanks to your teachings, Master.

root.m_Talk_DEU: I leave the future in your hands.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I leave the future in your hands.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Okay.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Okay.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Okay.

root.m_Talk_DEU: Leave the rest to me, and rest in peace.
